title: Kid Icarus Underworld Theme on Mario Paint Composer
description:
Go buy Kid Icarus on Virtual Console like I did. Kid Icarus is very good (yet a little frustrating). Enjoy this music from the challenging NES game (stage 1-1, 1-2, 1-3). This song is also featured in Super Smash Bros Brawl.

Software used:
Music: Mario Paint Composer - http://www.unfungames.com/mariopaint/

Notation: MidiNotate Player - http://www.notation.com/MidiNotatePlayer.htm

Video: FreezScreen Video Capture - (not recommended)

All free, legal, and unlimited.
